user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Azure Ridge Partners. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-13 15:41 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-01-06 14:53 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Azure Ridge Partners
Date: 2024-03-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:11:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:16:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:22:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
